## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and address concerns related to the performance of certain keywords and the content strategy for the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The keyword "second screen" is experiencing a significant drop in performance, which needs to be addressed.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [There is a need to better connect the blog content to the theme of "community" and the company's positioning as a community tool.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [The blog posts have become repetitive in terms of topics, titles, and images, which may be impacting engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Improvements are needed in image selection and design to make the posts more visually appealing and engaging.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [A more structured approach to content planning and topic selection is required to avoid repetition and ensure a diverse range of topics.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Performance and Content Strategy

  - [The keyword "second screen" is experiencing a significant drop in performance, which is concerning.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [There is a need to create content specifically targeting this keyword and the broader theme of "community."](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [The blog posts have become repetitive in terms of topics, titles, and images, which may be impacting engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Suggestions were made to space out similar topics, diversify the content, and improve the visual appeal of the posts.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Image and Design Improvements

  - [The current blog post images are not visually appealing and lack diversity, often featuring generic stock images.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [There is a need to incorporate more engaging visuals, such as people interacting with the product or technology.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [The team plans to involve a designer to improve the image selection and design for future blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Content Planning and Prioritization

  - [A more structured approach to content planning and topic selection is required to avoid repetition and ensure a diverse range of topics.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [The team will prioritize and share a list of topics and keywords to focus on for the upcoming weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Feedback and input from the team members will be incorporated into the content planning process.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paola will provide a comprehensive feedback document on the existing blog posts by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Sadira will discuss the SEO strategy with Jimmy and explore ways to avoid content repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [PH and Paola will share a prioritized list of topics and keywords for the upcoming weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [The team will involve a designer to improve the visual appeal of the blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Sadira will share the planned topics for the next week with the team for review and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/C7U7dmzS8jsb1LTMfmuX6yeLnwPFmxzH?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
